subcategory: Interactive WebGL neural vortex shader background with pointer-responsive organic patterns
use_cases: Dynamic background for hero sections and landing pages requiring visual impact
Interactive ambient visual for creative portfolios and digital experiences
Eye-catching entry point for marketing websites and product launches
Animated backdrop for SaaS dashboards and application interfaces
Decorative vortex effect for entertainment and media platforms
ai_summary: A WebGL-powered neural vortex background featuring organic shader patterns that respond to pointer movement and time. The shader uses sophisticated mathematics with sine wave accumulation, rotation matrices, and multi-layer iterations to create flowing, colorful vortex animations. Ideal for creating immersive visual experiences on landing pages, hero sections, or any application requiring a captivating animated background.
